item.title: Best AI Detector in 2026 — Free, Accurate & No Sign-Up
item.description: The definitive guide to choosing the best AI detector. Compare accuracy, features, and pricing. Our free tool leads with word-level heatmap and rewrite suggestions.

item.title: How to Detect AI-Generated Content — A Complete Methodology
item.description: Learn how AI detection actually works. Understand the signals, limitations, and best practices for identifying AI-generated text in 2026.

item.title: Best AI Detector for Academic Writing (2026) — Free & Accurate
item.description: The best free AI detector for research papers and theses. Word-level heatmap, rewrite suggestions, no sign-up required.

item.title: Best AI Detector for Bloggers (2026) — Free & Accurate
item.description: The best free AI detector for blog posts and content marketing. Word-level heatmap, rewrite suggestions, no sign-up required.

item.title: Best AI Detector for Copywriters (2026) — Free & Accurate
item.description: The best free AI detector for client deliverables. Word-level heatmap, rewrite suggestions, no sign-up required.

item.description: The best free AI detector for essays and academic papers. Word-level heatmap, rewrite suggestions, no sign-up required.

item.title: Best AI Detector for Freelancers (2026) — Free & Accurate
item.description: The best free AI detector for proving originality to clients. Word-level heatmap, rewrite suggestions, no sign-up required.

item.title: Best AI Detector for Hiring (2026) — Free & Accurate
item.description: The best free AI detector for resumes and cover letters. Word-level heatmap, rewrite suggestions, no sign-up required.

item.title: Best AI Detector for Publishers (2026) — Free & Accurate
item.description: The best free AI detector for manuscript review. Word-level heatmap, rewrite suggestions, no sign-up required.

item.title: Best AI Detector for SEO (2026) — Free & Accurate
item.description: The best free AI detector for seo content quality. Word-level heatmap, rewrite suggestions, no sign-up required.

item.title: Best AI Detector for Students (2026) — Free & No Sign-Up
item.description: The best AI detector for students who need to check essays, assignments, and research papers. Free, private, and no account required.

item.title: Best AI Detector for Teachers (2026) — Check Student Work Free
item.description: Free AI detector for teachers to check student essays and assignments. Word-level heatmap shows exactly which parts may be AI-generated.

item.title: Best GPTZero Alternative (2026) — Free AI Detector with Word Heatmap
item.description: Looking for a GPTZero alternative? Get word-level heatmaps and rewrite suggestions for free — no sign-up, no limits.

item.title: Best Originality.ai Alternative (2026) — Free AI & Plagiarism Detection
item.description: Looking for an Originality.ai alternative? Get word-level AI detection with rewrite suggestions — free, no credits required.

item.title: Copyleaks vs Originality.ai — AI Detector Comparison (2026)
item.description: Copyleaks vs Originality.ai: pricing, accuracy, features compared. Which AI detector is worth paying for — or should you use a free alternative?

item.title: Detect ChatGPT Text — Free ChatGPT Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was written by ChatGPT (GPT-3.5, GPT-4, GPT-4o). Free word-level heatmap shows exactly which sentences ChatGPT generated.

item.title: Detect Claude Text — Free Claude AI Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was written by Anthropic's Claude (Claude 3, Claude 3.5, Claude 4). Word-level analysis shows exactly which parts Claude generated.

item.title: Detect DeepSeek Text — Free DeepSeek AI Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was written by DeepSeek AI. Free word-level detection with heatmap analysis and rewrite suggestions.

item.title: Detect Gemini Text — Free Google Gemini Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was written by Google Gemini (Gemini Pro, Gemini Ultra). Free detection with word-level heatmap analysis.

item.title: Detect GPT-4 Text — Free GPT-4 Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was written by OpenAI's GPT-4. Free word-level detection shows exactly which sentences GPT-4 generated.

item.title: Detect GPT-4o Text — Free GPT-4o Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was written by OpenAI's GPT-4o or GPT-4o mini. Free detection with word-level heatmap analysis.

item.title: Detect LLaMA Text — Free Meta LLaMA Content Detector
item.description: Check if text was generated by Meta's LLaMA (LLaMA 3, LLaMA 3.1). Free word-level AI detection with heatmap.

item.title: GPTZero vs Originality.ai — Which AI Detector Is Better? (2026)
item.description: Detailed comparison of GPTZero and Originality.ai: accuracy, pricing, features, and which one is worth paying for. Plus a free alternative.

item.title: ZeroGPT vs GPTZero — Free AI Detectors Compared (2026)
item.description: ZeroGPT vs GPTZero: which free AI detector is better? Accuracy, features, and limits compared — plus a better free option.

item.title: AI Detector Accuracy: How Accurate Are AI Detectors Really in 2026?
item.description: How accurate are AI detectors in 2026? We break down real AI detector accuracy, false positives, false negatives, and what you should actually trust.

item.title: AI Detector Rewrite Suggestions: How to Fix AI-Like Sentences Without Rewriting Everything
item.description: Need AI detector rewrite suggestions? Learn how to fix AI-like sentences, reduce false positives, and improve your text without rewriting everything from scratch.

item.title: Which Sentences Are AI-Written? How to Spot and Fix Them
item.description: Wondering which sentences are AI-written? Learn how to spot AI-like sentences, why detectors flag them, and how word-level highlighting helps you fix them.

item.title: Why AI Detectors Give False Positives — And How Word-Level Highlighting Fixes It
item.description: AI detectors flag human writing as AI-generated all the time. Learn why false positives happen, why a percentage score isn't enough, and how word-level AI highlighting lets you see and fix the exact problem.

item.title: AI Detector False Positives — Why Human Writing Gets Flagged (And How to Fix It)
item.description: AI detectors flag human writing as AI all the time. Learn why false positives happen, which tools are worst for them, and how to prove your text is human-written.

item.title: AI Detector with Rewrite Suggestions — Fix AI-Sounding Text Instantly
item.description: Detect AI-generated text and get instant rewrite suggestions for flagged sentences. The only free AI detector that tells you what to change and how to change it.

item.title: AI Detector Word Highlighting — See Exactly Which Words Are AI-Written
item.description: The only free AI detector that highlights individual words and phrases flagged as AI-generated. Not just a score — see the evidence at the word level.

item.title: Why AI Detectors Get False Positives — And What To Do About It
item.description: AI detectors flag human writing as AI all the time. Here's why it happens, which writing styles are most at risk, and exactly how to fix a false positive result.

item.title: 5 Best Free AI Detectors (No Sign-Up Required)
item.description: Need to check if text is AI-generated without creating an account? These 5 tools are completely free and require no registration.

item.title: 7 Best AI Detector Tools in 2026 (Tested & Compared)
item.description: We tested 7 popular AI detector tools on the same texts. Here's what actually works — and what doesn't.

item.title: AI Content Detector — Check If Your Content Was AI-Generated
item.description: Free AI content detector for bloggers, editors, and SEO teams. Instantly check if content was written by AI. Supports ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more.

item.title: AI Humanizer — Make AI Text Sound Human & Bypass AI Detection
item.description: Learn how to humanize AI-generated text so it reads naturally and passes AI detection tools. Tips, tools, and techniques for writers, students, and marketers.

item.title: AI Text Detector — Identify AI-Written Content in Seconds
item.description: Free AI text detector that identifies content written by ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other LLMs. Paste text, get instant results. No signup needed.

item.title: ChatGPT Detector — Check If Text Was Written by ChatGPT
item.description: Use our free ChatGPT detector to find out if text was generated by ChatGPT (GPT-3.5, GPT-4, GPT-4o). No signup. Instant results.

item.title: Free AI Checker — Detect AI-Generated Text Instantly
item.description: Use our free AI checker to detect AI-generated content from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and more. No signup required. Accurate, fast, and free.

item.title: About AI Detector — Who We Are & Why We Built This
item.description: AI Detector is a free, no-signup AI content detection tool with word-level heatmap and rewrite suggestions. Learn about the team and technology behind it.

item.title: AI Detector FAQ — Frequently Asked Questions
item.description: Answers to the most common questions about AI detection: accuracy, false positives, supported models, privacy, and how to use our free AI detector.

item.title: How to Detect AI-Generated Writing (7 Methods That Actually Work)
item.description: Learn how to spot AI-generated text using both tools and manual techniques. Includes free methods anyone can use right now.

item.title: Why AI Detectors Keep Getting It Wrong (And What That Means for You)
item.description: AI detectors flag innocent writers as AI, while missing actual AI content. Here's the science behind why, and what you should actually trust.
